title: Complete workflow — road cross-section in Classification color mode
capture_instructions: Split-viewport layout. The 3D viewport should show the Queens Campus road section in Classification color mode (multi-colored by class). The profile line should cross a road section perpendicularly. The 2D viewport (Profile view) should show a clear cross-section with road points (one color), sidewalk points (another color), and vegetation or other points at different heights, creating a visually distinct layered cross-section shape.
ui_state: Plan/Profile active, Classification color mode, Profile view open, road cross-section displayed

annotations.label: 2D Profile view — road cross-section by height
Slab center line crossing the road
Road surface points in profile (lowest height band)
Sidewalk / kerb points at slightly higher elevation
